creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #1)

The change is marked as a patch release in upstream's versionning scheme, so I applied for MFH.

I trust your discretion in deciding whether to MFH it or not.  It'll be fine either way, but in case you don't, it will be more annoying to prepare two separate patch sets if there is another patch release that actually fixes a significant bug before 2022Q3 drops.
